title: About Lihe Precision

banner.alt: about-banner - Lihe Precision Machinery manufacturing facility

headline: Engineering Precision. Delivering Performance.
companyIntro: Foshan Lihe Precision Machinery Co., Ltd. is a specialized manufacturer of high-performance PET molds, headquartered in Foshan, Guangdong Province — one of China's foremost industrial manufacturing hubs. Operating from a modern 15,000 sqm production facility, we design and manufacture preform molds, blow molds, closure molds, compression molds, hot runner systems, and precision machining components for the global PET packaging industry.
philosophy: Our engineering team brings decades of hands-on experience in the PET high-end mold sector. Every mold we deliver is the product of rigorous design validation, advanced CNC machining, and comprehensive quality inspection — ensuring consistent cycle performance, dimensional accuracy, and extended service life. We partner with customers to optimize mold configurations for their specific production environments, machine platforms, and packaging requirements.
business: Our molds serve the beverage, water, edible oil, pharmaceutical, daily chemical, and food packaging industries worldwide. We engineer solutions compatible with leading equipment brands including HUSKY, SIDEL, KRONES, KHS, NETSTAL, SIPA, SACMI, and more — delivering molds that integrate seamlessly into existing production lines.

whyLihe.title: Proven Expertise
whyLihe.description: 20+ years of specialized experience in PET mold design and manufacturing, with a team of seasoned R&D engineers and production specialists.

whyLihe.title: Precision Manufacturing
whyLihe.description: World-class equipment from Mazak, Makino, and Okamoto, combined with Zeiss metrology systems, ensures every component meets exacting tolerances.

whyLihe.title: Global Compatibility
whyLihe.description: Molds engineered for seamless integration with HUSKY, SIDEL, KRONES, KHS, NETSTAL, SIPA, SACMI, and other major equipment platforms.

whyLihe.title: End-to-End Service
whyLihe.description: From initial design consultation through manufacturing, quality assurance, and after-sales technical support — a single point of accountability.

values.title: Precision
values.subtitle: Accuracy in every micron
values.description: We hold ourselves to the tightest manufacturing tolerances. Every mold component undergoes multi-stage inspection to guarantee dimensional integrity and repeatable production performance.

values.title: Partnership
values.subtitle: Your success is our benchmark
values.description: We work as an extension of our customers' engineering teams — collaborating on mold design optimization, material selection, and production efficiency to maximize output and minimize downtime.

values.title: Innovation
values.subtitle: Continuous advancement
values.description: We invest in the latest CNC machining, EDM, and metrology technologies. Our R&D team continuously refines mold designs to reduce cycle times, improve cooling efficiency, and extend tool life.

values.title: Reliability
values.subtitle: Consistent delivery, every time
values.description: Rigorous project management and production planning ensure on-time delivery. Our molds are built to perform under demanding production schedules with minimal maintenance requirements.
